name: Golf Services
about: Golf Services is a golf facility established in 1984, located in Kalamazoo, Michigan. It offers a comprehensive range of services including a driving range, pro shop, golf lessons, club repair and regripping, and golf club fitting. The facility is equipped with a TrackMan Range system, providing advanced swing analysis and club fitting technology. It caters to golfers of all ages and skill levels, offering personalized instruction and equipment solutions to improve performance.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to TrackMan Range technology for advanced swing analysis
Personalized club fitting using TrackMan TM4 system
Comprehensive services including lessons, repairs, and retail
Welcoming environment for all skill levels with group and private options
Convenient location with ample parking and a well-maintained facility

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned on the website.
No alcohol service mentioned on the website.

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary launch monitor for fitting and range analysis

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, Golf Services offers club rentals and a 'Try Before You Buy' option with clubs from their fitting stock and inventory.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are mentioned on the website. The facility does not have an on-site kitchen or bar.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: Simulator play time is not specified on the website, as the focus is on practice, fitting, and lessons rather than virtual course play.

faq.question: Is Golf Services kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Golf Services offers golf lessons for all ages, including programs specifically designed for juniors and youth golfers.
